caption: The video showcases a trading platform interface, specifically Orbis Pro Trader, displaying various charts and data for Intel Corporation (INTC) on November 22, 2013. The screen is divided into multiple sections, each showing different time frames of INTC's stock performance, including 15-minute, 5-minute, 2-minute, and 1-minute intervals, as well as a daily view. The central part of the screen displays real-time bid and ask prices with corresponding sizes from various market makers. As the video progresses, there are slight changes in the bid and ask sizes, indicating ongoing trading activity. The stock price remains relatively stable around $23.93, with minor fluctuations visible in the candlestick charts. The overall layout provides traders with comprehensive information to make informed decisions, highlighting the dynamic nature of the stock market.
